violations.text: The hand-washing sink in the kitchen and front service area was lacking paper towels. Paper towels were supplied at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/11/2026

Soap was not available at the hand-washing sinks in the kitchen and front service area. Hand-washing sinks must be provided with a supply of hand cleaning liquid, powder, or bar soap. Hand soap was supplied at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/11/2026

Raw animal foods eggs were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods English muffins in the 1 door reach-in. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. Proper food storage reviewed. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/11/2026

Cream and milk were observed held at 50 degrees Fahrenheit in the small cream unit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Per PIC, food was just recently placed into unit. Cream and milk were moved to prep unit at the time of inspection. Establishment is not to store any TCS foods in unit until unit is able to keep an internal food temperature of 41 DF or less. Sausage and milk were observed held at 44 degrees Fahrenheit in the 1 door reach-in. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. 1 door reach-in fan was observed being blocked by boxes, restricting the airflow to the bottom shelf. Food was moved to prep unit at the time of inspection. Establishment is to ensure that 1 door reach-in is able to keep all food at an internal temperature of 41 DF or less. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/11/2026
The 2-door reach-in located in the kitchen area was nonoperational and in poor repair. Equipment must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 05/18/2026
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the chlorine sanitizing solution for the 3-bay sink. Establishment is to obtain test strips. New Violation. Correct By: 05/15/2026
Establishment is lacking proper drain plugs for the 3-bay sink. Establishment is to obtain drain plugs. New Violation. Correct By: 05/11/2026

The following non-food contact surfaces have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. -1 door reach-in -Sugar bin -2 door reach-in -Donut case -1 door lowboy -Small cream unit (ice build-up) Non-food contact surfaces must be cleaned to sight and touch. New Violation. Correct By: 05/11/2026

The 3-bay sink was observed with dripping water and not adequate pressure. Per PIC, 3-bay sink bays are filled with spray house. Establishment is to have 3-bay sink faucet serviced. New Violation. Correct By: 05/18/2026
The door to the kitchen toilet room is not self-closing. Toilet rooms must be self-closing. New Violation. Correct By: 05/11/2026

The floors and walls throughout the facility have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 05/11/2026

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed in the kitchen area. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. New Violation. Correct By: 05/11/2026
The hand-washing sink in the kitchen (front & back) was lacking paper towels. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/16/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (ice machine) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. See disposal. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 01/16/2025
Table in prep area was not in good repair, observed open seal with exposed wood. New Violation. Correct By: 01/30/2025
The non-food contact surfaces of the vent have an accumulation of dust, dirt, and other debris. PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 01/30/2025

The floor and wall junctures coving was in poor repair. 1. Wall (back door) observed incomplete seal with missing pieces 2. Floor (back door) observed missing pieces with incomplete seal The floor and wall junctures must be coved and closed to no larger than 1/32nd of an inch. New Violation. Correct By: 02/13/2025
Mops must be allowed to air dry after use. PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 01/30/2025
